statusLine: EU fuel stocks are under strain with 19 of 27 countries holding critical reserves in at least one fuel type, despite overall averages remaining above mandatory minimums.
fullAnalysis:
While EU-wide averages show petrol at 110.1 days, diesel at 100.5 days, and jet fuel at 94.9 days—all above the 90-day mandatory minimum—the country-level picture reveals significant vulnerabilities. A total of 19 of 27 EU countries are operating with critical stock levels in at least one fuel category, indicating widespread strain across the bloc's fuel security infrastructure.

The situation is particularly acute for jet fuel, where 16 countries hold critical reserves below 90 days, with Poland at just 25.3 days and Portugal at 26.7 days. Romania faces the most severe challenges with all three fuel types in critical status: petrol at 33.2 days, diesel at 32.4 days, and jet fuel at 76.4 days. Diesel stocks also show concerning patterns, with 11 countries below the 90-day threshold.

Fuel prices reflect underlying supply tensions, with Brent crude at $99.01 per barrel—down 8.57% recently but still 36.6% higher than pre-escalation levels in late February. EU average petrol prices have reached €1.809 per liter, with significant regional variations from Malta's €1.34 to the Netherlands' €2.389. These price disparities, combined with uneven stock distributions, suggest the bloc's fuel markets are operating under considerable pressure despite strategic reserve releases.
keyPoints: 19 of 27 EU countries hold critical fuel reserves in at least one category, despite bloc-wide averages above 90-day minimums
Jet fuel reserves show the greatest strain with 16 countries below critical thresholds, including Poland at 25.3 days
Romania faces comprehensive fuel security challenges with all three fuel types in critical status below 80 days
Brent crude remains elevated at $99.01/barrel, up 36.6% from pre-escalation February levels despite recent 8.57% decline
Diesel stocks in 11 countries fall below the 90-day mandatory minimum, with Slovakia at just 44.7 days
